title: Jefferies Misses on Earnings: Does it Signal a Speed Bump or U-Turn?
text: Jefferies Financial Group NYSE: JEF has missed earnings expectations by a massive 84.6%, making the second quarter of 2023 one of the least profitable quarters for the firm since the 2008 financial crisis.

title: Why Charles Schwab became a financial 'supermarket'
text: Charles Schwab is the largest brokerage business in the U.S., a leading provider for financial advisors, a top ETF asset manager and one of the biggest banks.

title: Interactive Brokers Introduces Access to Nasdaq Copenhagen and the Prague Stock Exchange
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Interactive Brokers announced that clients of Interactive Brokers can trade shares on Nasdaq Copenhagen (CPH) and the Prague Stock Exchange (PSE).

title: Restructuring Efforts Aid Interactive Brokers (IBKR), Costs Ail
text: Interactive Brokers' (IBKR) efforts to develop proprietary software will keep aiding profits. High costs may hurt the bottom line.

title: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Up as May DARTs Rise Sequentially
text: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) reports an increase in total client DARTs for May.

title: Interactive Brokers Group Reports Brokerage Metrics and Other Financial Information for May 2023, Includes Reg.-NMS Execution Statistics
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IBKR #IBKR--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) an automated global electronic broker, today reported its Electronic Brokerage monthly performance metrics for May. Brokerage highlights for the month included: 1.860 million Daily Average Revenue Trades (DARTs)1, 19% lower than prior year and 5% higher than prior month. Ending client equity of $345.1 billion, 10% higher than prior year and 1% higher than prior month. Ending client margin loan balances of $39.8 bi.
